title: mapouria micrantha
intro: Mapouria micrantha is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, commonly known as a shrub or small tree. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Mapouria micrantha include the treatment of fever, wounds, and skin conditions, as well as the management of respiratory issues and gastrointestinal problems. Herbal preparations of Mapouria micrantha are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and can be used both internally and externally to harness its medicinal properties.
